page_desc: Inkonzo ye-imeyile yethutyana efanelekileyo. Khusela ubumfihlo bakho kwaye unqambe i-spam ngee-imeyile ezikhawulezayo nezikhuselekileyo. Akukho bhaliso lufunekayo.
duplicate_email_error: Idilesi sele ikhona kwithala leencwadi! Zama iSimaphambili se-imeyile esahlukileyo.
delete_confirm: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima le bhokisi yangaphakathi?
privacy_content:
• Asiyigcini ngokusisigxina imiyalezo; zicinywa ngokuzenzekelayo emva kwexesha elifutshane.
  • Asiceli nayiphi na idatha yobuqu okanye izazisi ukwenza i-imeyile.
  • Le nkonzo yenzelwe ukukhusela imfihlo yakho kwi-spam.
  • Ngokusebenzisa isayithi, uyavuma ukucinywa ngokuzenzekelayo kwedatha rhoqo kwiiyure ezingama-24.
faq_content:
Ihlala ixesha elingakanani i-imeyile?

Ihlala isebenza lo gama nje isikhangeli sivuliwe, kwaye ithala leencwadi liyacocwa rhoqo kwiiyure ezingama-24 ukuqinisekisa ubumfihlo.

Ndingayifumana kwakhona i-imeyile ecinyiweyo?

Hayi, kanye xa icinywe ngokuzenzekelayo okanye ngesandla, idatha ayinakufunyanwa ngokusisigxina.

Ingaba inkonzo isimahla?

Ewe, inkonzo ikhululekile ngokupheleleyo kwaye ixhaswa ngeentengiso ezilula ukuqinisekisa ukusebenza okuqhubekayo.

Kutheni ndingafumani miyalezo?

Qinisekisa ukuba uyayihlaziya ibhokisi yangaphakathi. Ezinye iisayithi zinokuvala imimandla yethutyana; zama ukutshintsha ithambeka kuluhlu.

Ndizikhusela njani iiakhawunti zam ezisemthethweni?

Sebenzisa i-imeyile yethu yethutyana ukuze ubhalise kwiindawo ezingathembekanga ukukhusela i-imeyile yakho ephambili ekugqekeni kunye nogaxekile.
privacy_policy_content:
• Asiyigcini ngokusisigxina imiyalezo; zicinywa ngokuzenzekelayo emva kwexesha elifutshane.
  • Asiceli nayiphi na idatha yobuqu okanye izazisi ukwenza i-imeyile.
  • Le nkonzo yenzelwe ukukhusela imfihlo yakho kwi-spam.
  • Ngokusebenzisa isayithi, uyavuma ukucinywa ngokuzenzekelayo kwedatha rhoqo kwiiyure ezingama-24.
inbox_full_desc: Ufumene owona mlinganiselo uphezulu wemiyalezo. Ngokunqabiseka, nceda wenze i-imeyile entsha ukuze ufumane eminye imiyalezo.
